requirement.description: If a door open condition is detected while the vehicle is in motion, the gateway shall generate a door warning condition.
requirement.python_test_setup:
import os
import time
import pytest
import can

MSG_ID_GW_WARNINGS = 0xD2
EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES = 5

@pytest.fixture(scope="module")
def can_bus():
    bus = can.interface.Bus(interface=os.getenv('CAN_INTERFACE', 'socketcan'), channel=os.getenv('CAN_CHANNEL', 'can0'), bitrate=500000)
    yield bus
    bus.shutdown()

def decode_door_warning(data_bytes: bytes) -> int:
    # DoorWarning = bit 1 -> byte 0, bit 1
    return (data_bytes[0] >> 1) & 0x01

def collect_warning_messages(bus, duration_sec=2.0):
    msgs = []
    start = time.time()
    while time.time() - start < duration_sec:
        msg = bus.recv(timeout=0.2)
        if msg and msg.arbitration_id == MSG_ID_GW_WARNINGS:
            msgs.append(msg)
    return msgs

test_cases.title: Verify door warning inactive when stationary and doors closed
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed = 0; All doors closed; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_warn_001_stationary_closed(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    assert all(decode_door_warning(m.data) == 0 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify door warning inactive when stationary and door open
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed = 0; At least one door open; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_warn_002_stationary_open(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    assert all(decode_door_warning(m.data) == 0 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify door warning activates when moving and driver door opens
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed > 0; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_warn_003_driver_open_moving(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    assert all(decode_door_warning(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify door warning activates when moving and passenger door opens
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed > 0; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_warn_004_passenger_open_moving(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    assert all(decode_door_warning(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify door warning activates when multiple doors open while moving
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed > 0; Multiple doors open; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_warn_005_multiple_open_moving(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    assert all(decode_door_warning(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify door warning clears when doors close while moving
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed > 0; DoorWarning active; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_warn_006_clear_on_close(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    states = [decode_door_warning(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert states[-1] == 0

test_cases.title: Verify door warning clears when vehicle stops
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed > 0; Door open; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
steps: Ensure VehicleSpeed > 0 km/h and door open
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_warn_007_clear_on_stop(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    assert decode_door_warning(msgs[-1].data) == 0

test_cases.title: Verify immediate door warning when door opens while moving
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed > 0; All doors initially closed; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
steps: Maintain VehicleSpeed > 0 km/h with doors closed
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_warn_008_immediate_set(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    states = [decode_door_warning(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert 0 in states and 1 in states
    assert states[-1] == 1
